issues.detail: The skill does not specify how to handle sub-agent failures or empty diffs, missing error handling.
The skill lists specific agent names, limiting compatibility to those agents.
No examples are provided to illustrate usage.

scenarios.name: Parallel review of a staged diff before merge
scenarios.rationale: Treatment launches four read-only reviewers (intent/regression, security, performance/reliability, contracts/coverage) on the staged diff and aggregates filtered findings; baseline runs one generic review pass.

scenarios.name: Synthesize findings with prioritized path forward
scenarios.rationale: Treatment normalizes findings into file/line, category, severity, why, fix, confidence, and outputs fix now / fix soon / optional follow-up per the skill; baseline produces a flat list without dedup or severity ordering.
